title: Cannot create more than one table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TESTC (TESTC_ID INT PRIMARY KEY, TESTC_NAME VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE TESTD (TESTD_ID INT, TESTD_VALUE FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO TESTC (TESTC_ID, TESTC_NAME) VALUES (1, 'Sample Name');
INSERT INTO TESTD (TESTD_ID, TESTD_VALUE) VALUES (1, NULL);
SELECT * FROM TESTC LEFT JOIN TESTD ON TESTC.TESTC_ID = TESTD.TESTD_ID;
key_bug_features: Creating multiple tables fails in the database
